evidenceSummary: Official Coloplast South Africa campaign displayed a free SpeediCath Short sample form and stated that requests are qualified and verified for product suitability.
Official Coloplast sample clauses stated that approved sample requests are dispatched separately within three business days and receive free delivery in South Africa.
Official Coloplast South Africa campaign still displayed a free SpeediCath Short sample request and stated that Coloplast Care Advisors review requests for product suitability.
Official Coloplast sample clauses still state that approved sample requests are dispatched within 3 business days of confirmation and shipped free in discreet packaging within South Africa.
